title: T-115 — Manufacturing Operation Audit Trail screen (SET-057 §8.9.12)
prompt:
# T-115 — Manufacturing Operation Audit Trail screen (SET-057 §8.9.12)

PRD: 02-SETTINGS-PRD.md §8.9.11 + §8.9.12 (Manufacturing Operations Audit Trail)
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira

## Goal
Build SET-057 Manufacturing Operation Audit Trail — per-operation history viewer linked from SET-055 list 'View History' icon. Shows User / Action / Timestamp / Field diff (old → new) per change. Searchable by operation_name, user, date range.

## Implementation contract
1. Page at apps/web/app/(admin)/settings/manufacturing-ops/[operation_id]/history/page.tsx (Server Component) reads audit_log entries WHERE entity_type='manufacturing_operation' AND entity_id=operation_id, ordered by timestamp DESC.
2. List columns: timestamp, user (display name), action (create|update|delete), changed fields summary chip.
3. Each row expandable to show field-by-field diff (old → new) per §8.9.11 spec; uses the same recursive diff helper as T-108 / T-114.
4. Toolbar: search by operation_name (header lookup), date range filter, user filter dropdown.
5. RBAC: requires `manufacturing_operations.view` (per §8.9.10) AND `settings.audit.read`.

## Files
- apps/web/app/(admin)/settings/manufacturing-ops/[operation_id]/history/page.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/(admin)/settings/manufacturing-ops/[operation_id]/history/page.test.tsx [create]

## Acceptance criteria
See `acceptance_criteria` array.

## Test strategy
1. RED: RTL test seeds 3 audit_log entries for one manufacturing_operation (create + update + delete); asserts ordered render, expand-to-diff, RBAC.
   `pnpm --filter @monopilot/web vitest run apps/web/app/(admin)/settings/manufacturing-ops/[operation_id]/history/page.test.tsx`
2. RED must fail.
3. GREEN: implement Server Component + filters + expand-diff.
4. Re-run RED + `pnpm typecheck` + `pnpm lint`.

## Risk red lines
- Do not duplicate SET-013 global audit viewer (T-079); this is operation-scoped.
- Do not bypass withOrgContext (RLS).
- Do not import @radix-ui/* outside packages/ui (§0).

Stack: TS + Next.js App Router + Drizzle + pnpm + vitest + Playwright + Server Actions. PRD: 02-SETTINGS-PRD.md v3.5.

pipeline_inputs.description: Manufacturing Operation Audit Trail (SET-057): per-operation history viewer with diff and search filters.
pipeline_inputs.details: PRD §8.9.11/§8.9.12 SET-057: `Per-operation history viewer`. Linked from SET-055 list 'View History' icon (T-077). Shows User / Action / Timestamp / Field diff (old→new) per §8.9.11 sample audit_log entries. Reuses the same diff helper as T-108 / T-114 if exposed as shared util.
out_of_scope: Global audit log (covered by SET-013 / T-079)
acceptance_criteria: Given 3 audit_log entries exist for manufacturing_operation id 'op_789' (create + update + delete), when the page renders, then 3 history rows display in timestamp DESC with action badges.
Given the user expands the update row, when the diff renders, then changed fields (e.g. is_active true→false) appear in old→new pairs per §8.9.11 spec.
Given the user filters by date range 'last 7 days', when the list re-renders, then only entries within that window remain.
Given the caller lacks `manufacturing_operations.view` or `settings.audit.read`, when the page is requested, then a 403 page renders.
test_strategy: RED: RTL test seeds 3 audit entries + asserts list order, expand-to-diff, date filter, RBAC 403.
GREEN: implement Server Component + filters + expand-diff renderer.
risk_red_lines: Do not duplicate SET-013 global audit viewer (T-079); this is operation-scoped.
